$description: Animation and transition tokens. All motion must respect prefers-reduced-motion.

instant.usage: State changes that should feel immediate

reduced_motion.$description: When prefers-reduced-motion: reduce is active, ALL animations must either be disabled or replaced with simple opacity transitions.
reduced_motion.exceptions: None. No animation is essential enough to override user preference.

_agent_instructions.implementer: Always include prefers-reduced-motion media query. Use transition tokens, never arbitrary durations.
_agent_instructions.test-writer: Test that animations are disabled when prefers-reduced-motion is set.
_agent_instructions.e2e-tester: Validate reduced-motion behavior in contextual variant tests.
